mapper.sql: action_id, idempotency_key, incident_id, task_id, dispatch_request_id, assignment_id, agent_id, adapter_name, adapter_type, action_type, status, reason, request_hash, response_ref, payload_json, created_at, updated_at, executing_at, completed_at, failed_at, next_attempt_at, retry_waiting_at, executor_unavailable_at, claimed_by, claimed_at, lease_expires_at, worker_heartbeat_at, attempt_count, max_attempts, executor_name, last_error
mapper.insert: insert into adapter_actions () values ( #{action.actionId}, #{action.idempotencyKey}, #{action.incidentId}, #{action.taskId}, #{action.dispatchRequestId}, #{action.assignmentId}, #{action.agentId}, #{action.adapterName}, #{action.adapterType}, #{action.actionType}, #{action.status}, #{action.reason}, #{action.requestHash}, #{action.responseRef}, coalesce(coalesce(cast(#{action.payloadJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), #{action.createdAt}, #{action.updatedAt}, #{action.executingAt}, #{action.completedAt}, #{action.failedAt}, #{action.nextAttemptAt}, #{action.retryWaitingAt}, #{action.executorUnavailableAt}, #{action.claimedBy}, #{action.claimedAt}, #{action.leaseExpiresAt}, #{action.workerHeartbeatAt}, #{action.attemptCount}, #{action.maxAttempts}, #{action.executorName}, #{action.lastError} ) on conflict (action_id) do update set status = excluded.status, reason = excluded.reason, response_ref = excluded.response_ref, payload_json = excluded.payload_json, updated_at = excluded.updated_at, executing_at = excluded.executing_at, completed_at = excluded.completed_at, failed_at = excluded.failed_at, next_attempt_at = excluded.next_attempt_at, retry_waiting_at = excluded.retry_waiting_at, executor_unavailable_at = excluded.executor_unavailable_at, attempt_count = excluded.attempt_count, max_attempts = excluded.max_attempts, executor_name = excluded.executor_name, claimed_by = excluded.claimed_by, claimed_at = excluded.claimed_at, lease_expires_at = excluded.lease_expires_at, worker_heartbeat_at = excluded.worker_heartbeat_at, last_error = excluded.last_error
mapper.select: select * from adapter_actions where idempotency_key = #{idempotencyKey} order by created_at desc limit 1
select * from adapter_actions where incident_id = #{incidentId} order by created_at desc limit #{limit}
select * from adapter_actions where task_id = #{taskId} order by created_at desc limit #{limit}
select * from adapter_actions where status = #{status} order by created_at desc limit #{limit}
select * from adapter_actions where status in ('PENDING','RETRY_WAITING','EXECUTOR_UNAVAILABLE') and (next_attempt_at is null or next_attempt_at <= #{now}) order by created_at asc limit #{limit}

with candidate as ( select action_id from adapter_actions where adapter_type = #{adapterType} and (next_attempt_at is null or next_attempt_at <= #{now}) and (status in ('PENDING','RETRY_WAITING','EXECUTOR_UNAVAILABLE') or (status = 'CLAIMED' and lease_expires_at is not null and lease_expires_at <= #{now})) order by created_at asc limit 1 for update skip locked ) update adapter_actions a set status = 'CLAIMED', claimed_by = #{workerId}, claimed_at = #{now}, lease_expires_at = #{leaseExpiresAt}, worker_heartbeat_at = #{now}, updated_at = #{now} from candidate where a.action_id = candidate.action_id returning a.*
select * from adapter_actions order by created_at desc limit #{limit}
